name: Maple Breakfast Cake
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Maple syrup (divide into two parts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Using baking spray with flour, spray a 9-inch square cake pan and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, sift together pastry flour, whole wheat flour, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
4. In a separate medium bowl, combine beaten egg, milk, two-thirds cup of maple syrup, and melted butter.
5. Add the milk mixture to the flour mixture and mix well.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with a dash of cinnamon.
7. Drizzle with the remaining two tablespoons of maple syrup.
8. Bake for 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Turn off the heat and let cool for 10 minutes.
